# Chapter 1: Logic, sets, formal languages  (~80 pp)
- 1.1 Propositional and predicate logic (15) · 1.2 Sets, relations, functions (10) · 1.3 Formal languages and grammars (15) · 1.4 Computability: Turing machines, the halting problem (15) · 1.5 Logic in engineering: requirements as predicates (15) · 1.6 Failure section: ambiguous specifications and their cost (10)

**Archetype**: balance, scaling. **Project**: formalise three engineering requirements as logical predicates. **Exercises**: 30.
